subject: 微软研究院
object: Webwright终端原生浏览器代理框架
source_quote: Microsoft Research’s AI Frontiers lab built a different approach. Their new open-source framework, Webwright , gives the agent a terminal instead of a stateful browser session. The agent writes Playwright code to control browsers, runs bash commands, inspects logs, and iteratively refines scripts. Playwright is an open-source browser automation library, also from Microsoft, that supports programmatic control of Chromium, Firefox, and WebKit browsers.

subject: 阶跃星辰
object: StepAudio 2.5 Realtime：一款具有角色扮演RLHF和副语言理解的端到端语音模型
source_quote: StepFun, the Shanghai-based AI lab, released StepAudio 2.5 Realtime. It is an end-to-end real-time speech large language model with fully customizable persona capabilities.

subject: First Concepts
object: $1M pre-seed to develop AI workspace for creative teams - FoundersToday
source_quote: First Concepts raises $1M pre-seed to develop AI workspace for creative teams

subject: First Concepts
object: $1M pre-seed to develop AI workspace for creative teams - FoundersToday
source_quote: First Concepts, a startup developing an AI-powered workspace for creative professionals, has raised $1 million in pre-seed funding less than a year after launching.

subject: First Concepts
object: $1M pre-seed to develop AI workspace for creative teams - FoundersToday
source_quote: First Concepts develops an AI-native workspace designed to support creative teams during the early stages of project development, particularly in environments such as agencies where multiple pitches are managed simultaneously.

subject: First Concepts
object: $1M pre-seed to develop AI workspace for creative teams - FoundersToday
source_quote: Creative workflows often rely on a combination of disconnected tools, which can lead to fragmented context and inefficiencies when teams need to revisit or rebuild ideas. First Concepts addresses this by introducing an AI layer that integrates with existing tools while maintaining a shared understanding of project context.

source_quote: IT之家 5 月 25 日消息，面壁智能联合清华大学、OpenBMB 开源社区，今天正式发布并开源其在低比特大模型训练方向的最新成果 ——BitCPM-CANN。

source_quote: 官方表示，这是中国首个完全基于国产算力平台（华为昇腾）实现端到端训练并开源的三值（1.58-bit）大模型。
